textDisplay:
@IsmaailRashid OK, so the film starts a few days after the first part. We see Joel in his last minutes before he dies (the car in the trailer with the blood on the road?) that's him. He was run over by Luis (I think that was his name). Luis in turn kills himself in front of Sky. And so the story takes its course. In the last third there are a few changes to the concept, which sounds interesting, but I'm not that convinced. Her past also plays a big role. Long story short, the viewer is made to believe that she has defeated it, or rather overcome it, and the curse has been broken. But it's basically just an illusion. She is suddenly possessed while she is on stage, looking into the camera during a live show and the audience all start screaming while the camera cuts to a living room of a family who is watching the show.

Dw, it sounds crazier than it is. 

But i guess we all know whats gonna happen in part 3. It not just curses one person by time anymore, but instead multiple ppl.

Oh and best part is: we gonna get a glimbs of how it all starts too. But there is still way much room to explore
textOriginal:
@IsmaailRashid OK, so the film starts a few days after the first part. We see Joel in his last minutes before he dies (the car in the trailer with the blood on the road?) that's him. He was run over by Luis (I think that was his name). Luis in turn kills himself in front of Sky. And so the story takes its course. In the last third there are a few changes to the concept, which sounds interesting, but I'm not that convinced. Her past also plays a big role. Long story short, the viewer is made to believe that she has defeated it, or rather overcome it, and the curse has been broken. But it's basically just an illusion. She is suddenly possessed while she is on stage, looking into the camera during a live show and the audience all start screaming while the camera cuts to a living room of a family who is watching the show.

Dw, it sounds crazier than it is. 

But i guess we all know whats gonna happen in part 3. It not just curses one person by time anymore, but instead multiple ppl.

Oh and best part is: we gonna get a glimbs of how it all starts too. But there is still way much room to explore

Plus we could explore Jackson’s character more & his family, including his mom & dad, I dunno.
